summary_en: 850,000 shares (10.9% of issued shares) to be cancelled effective 2026-06-01 pursuant to Company Law article 178. Post-cancellation issued share count: 6,928,000 shares.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: A&A Material Corporation announced on 2026-05-22 that its Board of Directors resolved to cancel 850,000 treasury shares pursuant to Company Law article 178. The cancellation represents 10.9% of the company's issued share count prior to the action. The effective date is scheduled for 2026-06-01. Following completion, the company's issued share count will total 6,928,000 shares.
